since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.67%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -0.76% · Gold +0.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.67%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at -5.77%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.41%, NOW +2.98%, SAP +2.95%, WDAY +2.36%, PANW +2.06%. Laggards: LRCX -5.77%, AMAT -5.71%, KLAC -5.70%, TER -5.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.52% at $161.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
